What We Do

Our Services

🏗️

New Construction

Ground-up residential and commercial builds. From foundation to finish, we manage every phase with precision and care.

🔨

Renovations

Kitchen remodels, bathroom upgrades, basement finishing, and whole-home renovations that transform your space.

📐

Additions

Room additions, second stories, and bump-outs that seamlessly blend with your home's existing architecture.

🏢

Commercial Buildouts

Retail spaces, restaurants, offices, and tenant improvements built to code and delivered on schedule.

📋

Project Management

Full-service construction management including scheduling, permitting, subcontractor coordination, and inspections.

⚡

Emergency Repairs

Storm damage, structural issues, and urgent repairs handled quickly with quality workmanship.

Our Work

Featured Projects

New Construction

Riverside Modern Farmhouse

A 3,800 sq ft modern farmhouse featuring open-concept living, a chef's kitchen with custom cabinetry, and a wraparound porch overlooking the Des Plaines River.

Hinsdale, IL · 2025
Renovation

Naperville Kitchen & Bath Renovation

Complete kitchen and master bathroom renovation in a 1990s colonial, featuring custom cabinetry, quartz countertops, and a spa-inspired master bath with heated floors.

Naperville, IL · 2024
Commercial Buildout

Downtown Downers Grove Restaurant

Full commercial buildout for a 4,200 sq ft restaurant space including commercial kitchen, bar area, outdoor patio, and ADA-compliant facilities.

Downers Grove, IL · 2025
View All Projects

"Summit Builders transformed our 1970s ranch into a modern family home. They were transparent about costs, stuck to the timeline, and the craftsmanship is incredible. We've already recommended them to three neighbors."

Mike & Sarah Brennan Whole-Home Renovation, Naperville
